compiled_state.title: Write failing behavioral tests for figma-resync.py (RED)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What
Write tests/unit/test_figma_resync.py with failing behavioral tests covering all done definitions for the re-sync command. Tests must fail (RED) before implementation exists, then pass after figma-resync.py is implemented.

## Test file
tests/unit/test_figma_resync.py

## Fuzzy-match check
Source: figma-resync.py → normalized: figmaresyncpy
Test: test_figma_resync.py → normalized: testfigmaresyncpy
'figmaresyncpy' in 'testfigmaresyncpy' → YES ✓

## Behavioral tests (Given/When/Then)

### Test 1: Tag precondition — missing design:awaiting_review
Given: a ticket ID whose tags do NOT include 'design:awaiting_review'
When: figma-resync.py is invoked with that ticket ID
Then: exits 1 with error message containing 'design:awaiting_review' tag requirement

### Test 2: Tag precondition — tag present
Given: a ticket ID whose tags include 'design:awaiting_review' (mocked ticket show output)
When: figma-resync.py is invoked with that ticket ID (pull + merge mocked to succeed)
Then: exits 0

### Test 3: File lock — lock already held (fresh lock, within TTL)
Given: a lockfile exists at /tmp/dso-figma-resync-<ticket-id>.lock with mtime within 30 min
When: figma-resync.py is invoked
Then: exits 1 with error message indicating re-sync already in progress

### Test 4: File lock — stale lock cleanup
Given: a lockfile exists with mtime > 30 minutes ago (stale)
When: figma-resync.py is invoked (after mocking stale mtime)
Then: stale lock is removed, new lock is created, workflow proceeds (pull+merge mocked to succeed)

### Test 5: --non-interactive flag auto-confirms
Given: valid tag precondition, no lock conflict; pull+merge succeed; --non-interactive flag set
When: figma-resync.py is invoked
Then: no confirmation prompt issued; exits 0; tag swap performed; metadata comment added

### Test 6: Tag swap after successful merge
Given: ticket has design:awaiting_review tag; merge succeeds
When: figma-resync.py completes with --non-interactive
Then: ticket update removes 'design:awaiting_review', adds 'design:approved' preserving other tags

### Test 7: Metadata comment format
Given: successful merge; --non-interactive mode
When: figma-resync.py completes
Then: ticket comment is added containing all required fields: figma_file_key, timestamp, components_added, components_modified, components_removed, behavioral_specs_preserved

### Mock strategy
- Mock subprocess calls for: figma-api-fetch.sh (pull), figma-merge.py (returns JSON to stdout), ticket show, ticket update, ticket-comment.sh
- Do NOT hit real Figma API, ticket store, or filesystem beyond temp dir

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/unit/test_figma_resync.py exists with at least 7 test functions covering done definitions
  Verify: test -f tests/unit/test_figma_resync.py && python3 -m pytest tests/unit/test_figma_resync.py --collect-only -q 2>&1 | grep -c 'test_'
- [ ] All tests in test_figma_resync.py FAIL before figma-resync.py is implemented
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/unit/test_figma_resync.py -q 2>&1 | grep -E 'FAILED|error'; echo "exit: $?"
- [ ] Test file follows Given/When/Then behavioral framing (no source file grepping assertions)
  Verify: grep -v 'grep\|open.*\.py\|read.*source' tests/unit/test_figma_resync.py
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes (excluding test_figma_resync.py which is RED)
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci

comments.body: AC amendment (Gap: implicit_assumption): Tests must reference the same tag constant names as figma-resync.py will use from figma-tags.conf. Define TEST_TAG_AWAITING_REVIEW = 'design:awaiting_review' (or import from constants) at top of test file — do not hardcode the string in individual test assertions. Add AC: 'test_figma_resync.py defines or imports tag constants matching figma-tags.conf values'. Verify: grep -q 'TAG_AWAITING_REVIEW\|awaiting_review' tests/unit/test_figma_resync.py
comments.author: Test

comments.body: AC amendment (Gap: missing_error_path): Add test case test_lock_cleanup_on_failure: Given lockfile acquired successfully + figma-merge.py mocked to return non-zero exit; When figma-resync.py runs; Then: lockfile is removed at /tmp/dso-figma-resync-<ticket>.lock, exit code is non-zero, no tag swap performed, no metadata comment added. Add this as test 8 in test_figma_resync.py.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: AC amendment (Gap: missing_error_path): Add test case test_user_declines_confirmation: Given valid tag precondition, no lock conflict, pull+merge succeed; When user provides 'n' input to confirmation prompt (simulate via stdin mock, interactive mode — no --non-interactive flag); Then: exit 0 (or distinct code), no ticket tag swap performed, no metadata comment added, lockfile removed. Add as test 9 in test_figma_resync.py.
comments.author: Test
